automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md:6 — change_type: BEHAVIOUR. Correct: all three bugs are in pipeline behaviour, signal activation logic, and output generation logic. No pure content/SSOT changes.

File read. _evaluate_lab_range_activation_state at line 141. Bug confirmed at line 162-163: if high is not None and primary_value > high: return upper_bound_state — fires WITHOUT checking enable_upper_bound. Lower bound IS gated by enable_lower_bound at line 166. Asymmetry is the defect.

File read. _has_valid_numeric_bounds at line 1086: requires isinstance(min_val, (int,float)) AND isinstance(max_val, (int,float)) AND float(min_val) < float(max_val) — both bounds required. _has_any_numeric_bound at line 1097 already exists but is only used in interpretation-text path at line 1866. Usage sites of _has_valid_numeric_bounds: lines 1103, 1212, 1235, 1244, 1864.

File read. _ROOT_CAUSE_TARGETS at lines 65-101 (34 signal entries). compile_root_cause_v1 at line 396 returns None at line 433-434 when findings is empty. Signals not in _ROOT_CAUSE_TARGETS produce no finding and no fallback. DTO surface: report_v1.py:85 — root_cause_v1: Optional[RootCauseV1] = None.

backend/core/contracts/root_cause_v1.py read. RootCauseFindingV1 at line 48: extra='forbid', fields signal_id, primary_metric, signal_state, signal_confidence, hypotheses. RootCauseHypothesisV1 at line 34: extra='forbid', fields hypothesis_id, title, summary, hypothesis_confidence, evidence_for, evidence_against, missing_data, confirmatory_tests, safety_class. Fallback hypothesis must populate all required fields within this existing schema — no new fields permitted.

File read. compile_clinician_report_v1 at line 490. primary_root assigned at line 527: None when lead signal not in root_findings. String fallback at line 535: 'No hypothesis set available for this concern in v1.' This is a string-only fallback — no structured DTO fallback exists. The clinician report handles None gracefully (line 537 guards before accessing hypotheses). Required change: minimal null-guard verification only, no structural change to clinician report compilation path.
File read. Sprint 1 spec at lines 34-88. Three bugs match exactly. Branch naming fix/engine-trust-bugs confirmed at line 38. Success criteria at lines 83-88 match prompt success criteria.
File read at line 1. healthiq-core-engine role at line 34. Allowed scope includes backend/core/ — all three bug files are within scope.
File read at line 1. Scope globs: backend/core/**, backend/ssot/**, knowledge_bus/**, backend/tests/**. All sprint files are within declared agent scope.

compile_root_cause_v1 has a single implementation at root_cause_compiler_v1.py:396. _evaluate_lab_range_activation_state has a single implementation at signal_evaluator.py:141. _has_valid_numeric_bounds has a single definition at orchestrator.py:1086. No duplicate authority detected.

prompt sections 'Scope', 'In scope', 'Out of scope', 'Design rules' are explicit. Bug 1: activation logic only. Bug 2: scoring eligibility logic only. Bug 3: fallback emission only. No new analytical depth, no new phenotype/IDL/narrative work, no frontend changes per prompt lines 143-149.

Bug 1 target: mid-range cholesterol must not activate both signal_total_cholesterol_high and signal_total_cholesterol_low (prompt line 85). Bug 2 target: LDL max-only + HDL min-only panel must produce scored output not insufficient-bounds message (prompt line 103). Bug 3 target: non-governed lead signal must produce non-null WHY section via fallback (prompt line 128). Golden panel tests must continue to pass (prompt line 203).

RISK-1: Bug 1 enable_upper_bound default must be True (not False). False would silently suppress upper-bound activation on all existing signals that omit the flag, breaking golden panels. RISK-2: Bug 2 — score_biomarkers at orchestrator.py:542 delegates to self.scoring_engine.score_biomarkers(). Cursor must verify whether the scoring engine itself gates on both bounds; STOP 1 applies if that path requires broad redesign. RISK-3: Bug 3 fallback hypothesis_confidence must be a fixed constant (e.g. 0.0), and fallback text must be a constant phrase — no dynamic generation that could drift.

backend/scripts/run_work_package.py, golden_gate_local.py, update_cursor_status.py not referenced in prompt scope. backend/ssot/ not referenced. No tooling-leakage risk (.codex/, .vscode/) identified.

notes: Three determinism risks surfaced for Cursor to handle before implementation: (1) enable_upper_bound default=True required for backward compatibility; (2) scoring engine bounds-gate must be verified before Bug 2 implementation — STOP 1 applies if redesign required; (3) Bug 3 fallback content must be a constant phrase, not dynamically derived. All fixes are bounded to named files plus minimal supporting files within healthiq-core-engine scope.
